data.name: ValidationDisplayNameRequired
data.value: Display name is required.

data.name: ValidationUsernameRequired
data.value: Username is required.

data.name: ValidationUsernameTooLong
data.value: Username must not exceed 100 characters.

data.name: ValidationEmailRequired
data.value: A valid email address is required.

data.name: ValidationPasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

data.name: ValidationDepartmentRequired
data.value: Department selection is required.

data.name: ValidationRoleRequired
data.value: A valid role must be selected.

data.name: ValidationDepartmentNotFound
data.value: The selected department could not be found.

data.name: ValidationUserUsernameExists
data.value: A user with this username already exists.

data.name: ValidationUserEmailExists
data.value: A user with this email address already exists.

data.name: ValidationUserExternalIdentityExists
data.value: A user linked to this directory identity already exists.

data.name: ValidationMunicipalityRequired
data.value: Municipality name is required.

data.name: ValidationAdminUsernameRequired
data.value: Administrator username is required.

data.name: ValidationAdminNameRequired
data.value: Administrator name is required.

data.name: ValidationAdminEmailRequired
data.value: A valid administrator email address is required.

data.name: ValidationAdminPasswordRequired
data.value: Administrator password must be at least 8 characters long.

data.name: ValidationDefaultSlaPositive
data.value: Default SLA must be greater than zero.

data.name: ValidationDeploymentModeRequired
data.value: A valid deployment mode must be selected.

data.name: ValidationTenantDomainUnique
data.value: This domain is already assigned to another tenant.

data.name: ValidationAppearanceThemePresetRequired
data.value: Theme preset is required.

data.name: ValidationAppearanceHexColor
data.value: Color fields must use the `#RRGGBB` or `#RRGGBBAA` format.

data.name: ValidationUserSourceRequired
data.value: A valid user source must be selected.

data.name: ValidationLdapIdentifierRequired
data.value: A directory identity must be selected for LDAP users.

data.name: ValidationManualEmailRequired
data.value: Email is required for manual users.

data.name: ValidationManualPasswordRequired
data.value: Password is required for manual users.

data.name: ValidationLdapDisabled
data.value: LDAP integration is not enabled for this environment.

data.name: ValidationLdapSearchUnavailable
data.value: LDAP directory search is not available for this tenant.

data.name: ValidationLdapUserNotFound
data.value: The selected LDAP user could not be found in the directory.

data.name: ValidationAutomaticSignInModeRequired
data.value: A valid automatic sign-in mode must be selected.

data.name: ValidationSecondFactorProviderRequired
data.value: A valid second-factor provider must be selected.

data.name: ValidationTrustedNetworkRequired
data.value: At least one trusted network must be configured for automatic sign-in.

data.name: ValidationIdentityHeaderRequired
data.value: An identity header name is required for trusted-header mode.

data.name: ValidationWebhookUrlRequired
data.value: A webhook URL is required for the webhook provider.

data.name: ValidationCodeLengthRange
data.value: The verification code length must be between 4 and 8 digits.

data.name: ValidationCodeTtlRange
data.value: The verification code lifetime must be between 60 and 900 seconds.

data.name: AuthInteractiveInvalidTenant
data.value: Select a valid municipality.

data.name: AuthInteractiveSecondFactorUnavailable
data.value: The second-factor provider is not ready for this tenant.

data.name: AuthInteractiveChallengeSent
data.value: Verification code sent: {0}

data.name: AuthInteractiveChallengeSentWithoutDestination
data.value: Verification code sent.

data.name: AuthInteractiveSecondFactorWillBeRequired
data.value: Second-factor verification is required when signing in from this network.

data.name: AuthInteractiveFallbackToCredentials
data.value: Automatic corporate sign-in could not be completed. Enter your credentials.

data.name: AuthInvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid username or password.

data.name: AuthInteractiveChallengeVerified
data.value: Second-factor verification completed.

data.name: AuthInteractiveChallengeExpired
data.value: The verification code expired. Start the sign-in flow again.

data.name: AuthInteractiveInvalidChallengeCode
data.value: The verification code is invalid.

data.name: AuthInteractiveTooManyAttempts
data.value: Too many invalid attempts were made. Start the sign-in flow again.

data.name: ValidationUserIdRequired
data.value: User ID is required.

data.name: ValidationUserNotFound
data.value: User not found.

data.name: ValidationCannotDeleteSelf
data.value: You cannot delete your own account.

data.name: ValidationDepartmentIdRequired
data.value: Department ID is required.

data.name: ValidationDepartmentNameRequired
data.value: Department name is required.

data.name: ValidationDepartmentHasUsers
data.value: This department has assigned users. Move them to another department first.
